name: Mexican Salad
recipeIngredient: 6 Inch (15 cm) piece of black bean, drained and rinsed
1 small Green pepper, drained and rinsed
5 fl Natural fromage frais (up to 8% fat)
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Preparation time: 15 minutes
2. Freezing: not recommended
3. Selections per serving: 1/2 Fruit; 1-1/2 Protein; 1-1/2 Vegetable; 25 Optional Calories
4. Arrange the salad leaves on four serving plates.
5. Top with the cucumber, carrot, tomatoes, green pepper, and black bean.
6. Add raisins to each plate.
7. Sprinkle with the lime juice.
8. Blend the fromage frais with the tomato puree and mustard.
9. Season lightly with salt and pepper.
10. Spoon over the salads.
11. Divide the grated cheese between each plate and serve immediately.
